title: A history of New York
description: A history of New York : from the beginning of the world to the end of the Dutch dynasty ; containing, among many surprising and curious matters, the unutterable ponderings of Walter the Doubter, the disastrous projects of William the Testy, and the chivalric achievements of Peter the Headstrong ; the three Dutch governors of New Amsterdam ; being the only authentic history of the times that ever hath been or ever will be published.
subjects: New york (state), history, colonial period, ca. 1600-1775
New york (n.y.), social life and customs
United states, history, humor, caricatures, etc.
